panel.title: Frigate cameras
panel.empty: No cameras found. Check Frigate and your URL.

error.noUrl: Set your Frigate base URL in plugin settings.
error.fetch: Could not load cameras from Frigate

mjpeg.fallback: MJPEG failed for a camera; using snapshots instead.

panel.allHiddenByBlacklist: Every camera is listed in your hidden list. Clear or disable the blacklist in plugin settings.

dashboard.noUrl: Set your Frigate base URL in plugin settings first.

useMjpeg.label: Use MJPEG streams
useMjpeg.desc: Smoother live video when Frigate serves MJPEG without a token on the stream URL. If you set an API token, only snapshots are used.

snapshotInterval.label: Snapshot refresh (ms)
snapshotInterval.desc: How often to reload latest.jpg per camera (minimum 200 ms).

token.label: API token (optional)
token.desc: Bearer token for Frigate if authentication is enabled. Snapshots use this header; MJPEG cannot and will use snapshots only.

gridColumns.label: Grid columns
gridColumns.desc: Number of columns in the panel (1–4).

enabled.label: Hide cameras in the blacklist
enabled.desc: When on, camera names below are not shown in the panel. Matching is case-insensitive.

names.label: Hidden camera names
names.desc: Comma- or newline-separated Frigate camera names (same names as in Frigate config).
